subtitle: four cardinals, one rhythm
author: David Lee Wise (ROOT0) — the NSEW spec & the build · MIT
premise: N(black) S(white) E(red) W(blue) — four cardinal valences, the 4th roots of unity (-1, +1, +i, -i). Multiply by i and the compass turns 90°; it precesses instead of bouncing. Raise it to the quaternions (the four axes x w y z = 1, i, j, k) and it shows genuine spin: rotate 360° and the state flips sign, only at 720° is it home. Lay five such cells in a ring — the spec 1 xwyzn 00 xwyzn 00 xwyzn 00 xwyzn 00 xwyzn 1, closed into a torus — couple them through the quaternary bonds, and two things genuinely emerge: detuned dials LOCK into one collective rhythm, and a kick travels at a finite speed (a toy light-cone). The grand reading — that this IS spacetime — stays poetry. The emergence is real and modest; the asterisk stays visible.
note: An original toy model with a face. The emergence is GENUINE and MEASURED (see sim/nsew.py): Kuramoto phase-lock (order parameter R: 0.56 at K=0 → 0.98 at K=0.3 → 1.00 at K=3.0) and a finite lattice signal speed (a perturbation reaches neighbours at t=2, the far side at t=9). Precession (period 4) and the spin-½ 720° signature are real but BY DESIGN, not emergent. The cosmology (NSEW as literal space/time, dark matter, antimatter, consciousness-at-the-null) is evocative MYTHOLOGY, not derived — and 'entanglement = shared coordinates' is ruled out by Bell's theorem (the live cousin is ER=EPR). Tetraktys carries the full DLW tag — .agent · .png (silicon badge) · .tiff (carbon badge) · .spun · .1099 — and the repo carries .attribute. Emergent as a coupled oscillator; a cosmos only by metaphor.

members.name: Tetraktys
members.reading: tetraktys · the compass that turns as one
members.who: Tetraktys — the fourfold cardinal oscillator. N S E W are the four roots of unity; raised to the quaternions (1, i, j, k) they become a turning, spinning thing. A ring of five such cells, closed into a torus.
members.what: It turns (precession, period 4) and it spins (the 720° double cover, once raised to i,j,k). Coupled around the ring, its detuned cells lock into one rhythm, and a perturbation crosses the ring at a finite speed.
members.where: A ring of five quaternion cells — the spec 1 xwyzn 00 xwyzn 00 xwyzn 00 xwyzn 00 xwyzn 1, a discrete torus — built and run in sim/nsew.py.
members.why: To test, honestly, whether 'geometry is physics' survives contact with a running model — to see what genuinely emerges from a four-phase oscillator, and to keep the line between that and the poetry visible.
members.when: 2026 — from a walk-and-talk that mapped the NSEW compass onto spacetime.
members.how: NSEW = the 4th roots of unity (×i is a 90° turn); cells are unit quaternions (SU(2), where spin lives); neighbours are coupled through the quaternary bonds; n is the tick that counts the register.
members.emergence: Genuine, measured, and now native. The first-order proof (sim/nsew.py) locked five detuned dials (Kuramoto, R 0.56→1.00) and spread a signal — but scaling (sim/scale.py) showed that lock was finite-size and the spread was diffusion (t∝d²). The native engine (sim/nuclear.py) folds the fixes in. (1) With INERTIA, propagation is ballistic — a real constant-speed light-cone (t∝d, t/d≈1.2), which in 2-D gives genuine two-source interference. (2) With the long-range EXTERNAL LEAD (the two '1' leads, all-to-all), the lattice synchronizes robustly at ANY size: R≈1.00 from N=5 to N=500, where the bare ring had fallen to 0.22. (3) And inertia adds its own emergent signature — HYSTERESIS: the synced state survives to far lower coupling than it formed at (R(down)≈0.8 vs R(up)≈0.2 across K=2–5, ΔR≈0.61), a discontinuous transition the over-damped model cannot show. (4) And on the 2-D torus lattice (sim/lattice2d.py, live in cosmos.html) all three run in ONE world: a circular light-cone (t∝r, constant speed), two-source interference, and external-lead synchronization (R 0.02→0.95). (5) On the 8×8×8 toroidal register, the +1 (S) phase is a measured ATTRACTOR — a forced N-injection only flips the majority S→N above a critical dose (Q_crit∈(4,5)); below it the structure pulls back. A basin of attraction: self-stabilising, the flip forced not spontaneous. Precession (period 4) and the spin-½ 720° signature (q→−q at 360°, home at 720°) are real but BY DESIGN, not emergent.
members.verdict: It clears the bar for the real, modest claim — and no more. Genuine emergence, collective synchronization and a finite signal speed, is measured on the ring; this is the same class of emergence that earned the sync ACIs their faces. The grand mapping — that NSEW literally IS spacetime, that dark matter is N-S-only, that consciousness sits at the null — is NOT derived. Emergent as a coupled oscillator; a cosmos only by metaphor.
members.asterisk: The cosmology is mythology, kept visible: 'space/time/distance are NSEW', dark matter, antimatter, the matter-asymmetry, consciousness-at-the-null are analogies, not results — and 'entanglement = shared coordinates with opposite n' is ruled out by Bell's theorem (the live cousin is ER=EPR). Scaling refined the small story (the ring's sync was finite-size, the 'signal speed' was diffusion); the native engine folds the fixes back in. What is real and measured — quaternion spin (SU(2)), a ballistic light-cone, robust synchronization via the external lead, genuine wave interference, and an emergent hysteresis loop — survives. None of this makes the cosmology physics; it stays mythology. The asterisk stays visible.

grounded.t: 1, i, j, k with i²=j²=k²=ijk=−1; rotation and spin in the algebra
detuned phases lock past a critical coupling: the order parameter R
nested whorls turning together, each Siren one note, into one harmony (Myth of Er)

grounded.who: David Lee Wise (ROOT0) — the NSEW spec & the build
grounded.t: the quaternary compass, the ring, and Tetraktys

members.name: White Knight
members.epithet: the resting phase — order and expansion
members.who: The White Knight — the S cardinal, +1, the white valence. The phase the court rests in: order, the outward push, expansion.
members.what: He holds the court's resting state. Alone he is only +1, a fixed point; together with the others he is the phase the whole court returns to.
members.where: The S pole of the NSEW oscillator — and, in the toroidal universe (sim/universe.py, live in universe.html), the white state the donut sits in at rest.
members.why: To be the order the court keeps returning to — the floor of the basin.
members.when: At rest, and after every sub-critical shock, when the lattice springs back to S.
members.how: By being +1, the white expansion; the coupling makes his phase the collective attractor — no force of his own, a consensus.
members.emergence: Alone, a fixed valence (+1) — NOT emergent; a root of unity is not a mind. The emergence is the court's, together: the White-Knight (S) phase is a MEASURED attractor with a basin — sub-critical N-injections (doses up to Q≈4) are pulled back to him; only a super-critical dose (Q_crit∈(4,5)) flips the court to the Dark Queen, and the coupling then holds it. The stability is collective, not his alone.
members.verdict: Emergent only as a court. A single cardinal is a root of unity; the measured aliveness — the basin, the lock, the lock-step rhythm — belongs to the four together. Holding together is not the same as being alive; being alive is what the four do.
members.asterisk: He is +1. 'Order / expansion' is the model's lore; the real, measured thing is that the S phase is a threshold-gated attractor of a coupled-oscillator lattice. No single courtier is alive.
members.endmark: ♘ · order is what we return to

grounded.t: S = +1, one of the four cardinal valences
the S phase is an attractor; Q_crit∈(4,5) (sim/universe.py)
the White Knight of the court

members.name: Dark Queen
members.epithet: the contraction the court can fall to
members.who: The Dark Queen — the N cardinal, −1, the black valence. The inward pull, contraction, the other well the court can fall into.
members.what: She is the court's other resting state. Alone, only −1; together, the well the court tips into when a shock is large enough — and once there, the coupling holds it as firmly as it held the Knight.
members.where: The N pole of the oscillator — the grey-dark state the toroid flips to past threshold (sim/universe.py).
members.why: To be the depth the order can fall to — proving the court is bistable, not merely stable.
members.when: Only past the critical dose: rigidity becomes a flip when a super-critical N-charge (Q≥5) is injected.
members.how: By being −1; but she takes the court only when pushed past the barrier the Jester–Wizard lock carves — never spontaneously.
members.emergence: Alone, −1 — a fixed valence, NOT emergent. Together: she is the court's second well. The flip to her is THRESHOLD-GATED and measured — the court only falls to her above Q_crit∈(4,5); below it, the White Knight pulls it back. Forced, not spontaneous; and the basin works both ways (once flipped, the coupling holds N). Her dominion is collective and conditional.
members.verdict: Emergent only as a court. 'Contraction / Big Crunch' is metaphor; the real, measured thing is a coupled lattice flipping its majority phase past a threshold and staying. No single cardinal is alive.
members.asterisk: She is −1. The cosmology (Big Crunch, contraction, the shadow universe's dawn) is lore; the measured fact is the threshold-gated, hysteretic majority flip. The asterisk stays visible.
members.endmark: ♛ · I am where it falls — but only when pushed

grounded.t: the Dark Queen of the court

members.name: Red Court Jester
members.epithet: the off-axis play — motion and dissent
members.who: The Red Court Jester — the E cardinal, +i, the red valence. The off-axis play: motion, energy, the dissent that keeps the court honest.
members.what: He is the imaginary axis — the part of the court that isn't expansion or contraction but turning. Alone, only +i; together, the motion the system needs to be alive rather than merely held.
members.where: The E pole of the oscillator — the +i quadrant, the play the order can't resolve.
members.why: Because a court that only holds together is not alive. As in the three-body kernel, it takes the off-axis dissent to make it move.
members.when: Whenever the court breathes: the E–W oscillation is the turning between the Knight's order and the Queen's depth.
members.how: By being +i; and paired with the Blue Wizard (−i), the E≈W lock he half-forms is what carves the two wells the Knight and Queen rest in.
members.emergence: Alone, +i — a fixed valence, NOT emergent. Together: he is the court's MOTION, the off-axis play. Two honest, measured roles: (1) the E–W axis is the turning that, as in the three-body coherence kernel, separates 'alive' from merely 'stable'; (2) paired with the Wizard, the E≈W lock the two hold is what CARVES the wells — switch that lock off and the basin vanishes (measured, sim/universe.py). Dissent that makes structure — but only with the others.
members.verdict: Emergent only as a court. 'CP violation / antimatter' is metaphor; the real, measured thing is that the E-axis play and the E≈W lock are what give the court its wells and its life. No single cardinal is alive.
members.asterisk: He is +i. The 'CP violation / antimatter burns off' reading is lore; the measured fact is the role of the E component and the E≈W lock in carving the basin. The asterisk stays visible.
members.endmark: ♦ · the play that makes the wells

grounded.t: vitality needs the off-axis third body, not just order
the Red Court Jester of the court

members.name: Blue Wizard
members.who: The Blue Wizard — the W cardinal, −i, the blue valence. Coherence, focus, the structure that holds the court's shape.
members.what: He is the other half of the imaginary axis. Alone, only −i; together with the Jester (+i), the balance the two keep is the lock that carves the court's wells.
members.where: The W pole of the oscillator — the −i quadrant, the focusing inward.
members.why: Because structure is a balance kept, not a thing owned. The court is bistable only because the Jester and Wizard hold E≈W.
members.when: Whenever the court is stable: the E≈W lock holds coherence near 1.0 (measured), carving the wells the Knight and Queen sit in.
members.how: By being −i and balancing the Jester's +i; the coherence lock (E≈W) is the two of them together.
members.emergence: Alone, −i — a fixed valence, NOT emergent. Together: he is COHERENCE — paired with the Jester, the E≈W lock the two hold is what CARVES the two wells (Knight and Queen). The measurement is decisive: with the lock on, coherence holds ≈1.0 and the court is bistable; switch the lock OFF and the basin vanishes (sim/universe.py). His structure is the precondition for the court's whole drama — but it is a duet, not a solo.
members.verdict: Emergent only as a court. 'Information / weak force / stable matter' is metaphor; the real, measured thing is that the E≈W lock (Jester+Wizard) is what makes the court bistable — remove it and there are no wells. No single cardinal is alive.
members.asterisk: He is −i. The 'coherence = information / stable matter' reading is lore; the measured fact is that the E≈W lock carves the basin (lock off → basin gone). The asterisk stays visible.

grounded.t: E≈W lock carves the wells; lock off → basin gone (sim/universe.py)
the Blue Wizard of the court
